# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    routingMode: GLOBAL
    description: VPC network for three-tier application
    networkFirewallPolicyEnforcementOrder: AFTER_PREVIOUS_FIREWALL

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    description: Application tier subnet

- name: web-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    description: Web tier subnet

- name: db-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.3.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    description: Database tier subnet

- name: network-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    targetTags:
    - app-tier
    - web-tier
    - db-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
      - '22'
      - '80'
      - '443'
    - IPProtocol: UDP
      ports:
      - '53'
    - IPProtocol: ICMP

- name: app-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.0.2.0/24
    targetTags:
    - app-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
      - '8080'
      - '8443'

- name: db-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.0.1.0/24
    targetTags:
    - db-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: TCP
      ports:
      - '5432'
      - '3306'
